title: Transformers: Animated
synopsis: A small, ragtag crew of Autobots — originally a space bridge repair team — accidentally discovers the AllSpark and crash-lands on Earth in Detroit. Led by the young and inexperienced Optimus Prime, they must defend themselves against both human supervillains and the Decepticon faction seeking the AllSpark. With a bold art style, sharp humor, and deep character work, the series blends episodic adventures with overarching mythology as the team grows from nobodies into heroes worthy of the Autobot name.

episodes.title: Transform and Roll Out! (Part 1)
episodes.synopsis: A crew of Autobot misfits on a routine space bridge repair mission discovers the legendary AllSpark, drawing the attention of the Decepticon warship.

episodes.title: Transform and Roll Out! (Part 2)
episodes.synopsis: After a fierce battle with Megatron, the Autobots crash-land on Earth near Detroit and awaken 50 years later in the present day.

episodes.title: Transform and Roll Out! (Part 3)
episodes.synopsis: The Autobots meet Sari Sumdac and her father, settling into their new lives in Detroit as they protect the city and guard the AllSpark.

episodes.title: Home Is Where the Spark Is
episodes.synopsis: The Autobots set up their base in an abandoned auto plant, but Megatron's disembodied head secretly manipulates Professor Sumdac from within his lab.

episodes.title: Total Meltdown
episodes.synopsis: Scientist Prometheus Black transforms himself into the acid-spewing villain Meltdown in his obsessive quest to create a human transformer.

episodes.title: Blast from the Past
episodes.synopsis: Megatron, using Professor Sumdac's technology, reanimates robotic dinosaurs that Bulkhead accidentally created, turning them into the rampaging Dinobots.

episodes.title: The Thrill of the Hunt
episodes.synopsis: Decepticon bounty hunter Lockdown comes to Earth hunting Optimus Prime, triggering painful memories for Ratchet about the Great War.

episodes.title: Nanosec
episodes.synopsis: A petty thief gains super-speed from a stolen device but rapidly ages with each use, creating a high-velocity crisis for the Autobots.

episodes.title: Along Came a Spider
episodes.synopsis: The techno-organic Decepticon Blackarachnia arrives on Earth seeking the AllSpark to purge her organic half, revealing a shared past with Optimus Prime.

episodes.title: Sound and Fury
episodes.synopsis: Megatron manipulates Sumdac into building a musical robot called Soundwave, which uses sonic attacks to take control of Detroit's machines.

episodes.title: Lost and Found
episodes.synopsis: Decepticons Lugnut and Blitzwing arrive on Earth searching for Megatron, bringing massive firepower and unstable personalities to the conflict.

episodes.title: Survival of the Fittest
episodes.synopsis: Sari and Prowl investigate Meltdown's genetic experiments on Dinobot Island, uncovering horrifying hybrid creatures.

episodes.title: Headmaster
episodes.synopsis: A bullied nerd named Henry Masterson creates the Headmaster unit — a device that lets him take control of any Transformer by replacing their head.

episodes.title: Nature Calls
episodes.synopsis: A camping trip goes wrong when the Autobots encounter space barnacles that threaten to overwhelm them in the wilderness.

episodes.title: Megatron Rising - Part 1
episodes.synopsis: Megatron finally rebuilds his body using Sumdac's technology and attacks the Autobots to seize the AllSpark.

episodes.title: Megatron Rising - Part 2
episodes.synopsis: In the explosive Season 1 finale, the Autobots face a fully restored Megatron in a desperate battle, and the AllSpark is shattered into fragments scattered across Detroit.

episodes.title: The Elite Guard
episodes.synopsis: Ultra Magnus, Sentinel Prime, and Jazz of the Elite Guard arrive on Earth to assess the Autobots, but their arrogance clashes with the team's unconventional methods.

episodes.title: The Return of the Headmaster
episodes.synopsis: Henry Masterson returns with an upgraded Headmaster unit and takes control of Sentinel Prime's body, causing havoc.

episodes.title: Mission Accomplished
episodes.synopsis: The Elite Guard declares the Decepticon threat eliminated and prepares to take the Autobots home, but Starscream's attack proves them wrong.

episodes.title: Garbage In, Garbage Out
episodes.synopsis: An AllSpark fragment brings a garbage truck to life as the gentle but confused Wreck-Gar, who struggles to understand his own identity.

episodes.title: Velocity
episodes.synopsis: Bumblebee enters an illegal street race to recover an AllSpark fragment from a mysterious racer, putting his pride and the mission at odds.

episodes.title: Rise of the Constructicons
episodes.synopsis: AllSpark fragments bring two construction vehicles to life as Mixmaster and Scrapper, who befriend Bulkhead before being manipulated by Megatron.

episodes.title: A Fistful of Energon
episodes.synopsis: Prowl teams up with bounty hunter Lockdown to capture Starscream, but the uneasy alliance tests Prowl's principles.

episodes.title: SUV: Society of Ultimate Villainy
episodes.synopsis: Detroit's human supervillains form an alliance to defeat the Autobots, but their egos and incompetence undermine their schemes.

episodes.title: Autoboot Camp
episodes.synopsis: Flashbacks reveal Bumblebee and Bulkhead's time at Autobot boot camp under Sentinel Minor, and how Wasp was wrongly accused of being a Decepticon spy.

episodes.title: Black Friday
episodes.synopsis: Blackarachnia teams up with Meltdown in another attempt to purge her organic half, putting Sari and Optimus in danger.

episodes.title: Sari, No One's Home
episodes.synopsis: Sari must defend the Autobot base alone against the Constructicons when the rest of the team is called away on a mission.

episodes.title: A Bridge Too Close, Part I
episodes.synopsis: Megatron forces Professor Sumdac to complete a space bridge to bring a Decepticon army to Earth, while Starscream's clones attack from another front.

episodes.title: A Bridge Too Close, Part II
episodes.synopsis: In the Season 2 finale, the Autobots race to stop Megatron's space bridge from activating as Starscream achieves cosmic power, and the battle ends with Megatron and Starscream stranded in deep space.

episodes.title: TransWarped, Part I
episodes.synopsis: Sari discovers she is part Cybertronian when her key upgrades her into a teenager, while Shockwave's deep-cover infiltration of Autobot High Command is revealed.

episodes.title: TransWarped, Part II
episodes.synopsis: The Autobots deal with the fallout of Sari's transformation as Megatron and the Decepticons use the captured space bridge technology to strike at Cybertron.

episodes.title: TransWarped, Part III
episodes.synopsis: Omega Supreme is reactivated and controlled by the Decepticons, forcing the Autobots into a frantic battle to save their most powerful warrior.

episodes.title: Three's a Crowd
episodes.synopsis: Lugnut and Blitzwing attempt to build a Decepticon army using Starscream's cloning technology, creating the massive Lugnut Supreme.

episodes.title: Where Is Thy Sting?
episodes.synopsis: Wasp, now the mutated Waspinator, seeks revenge on Bumblebee for the wrongful accusation that destroyed his life.

episodes.title: Five Servos of Doom
episodes.synopsis: Prowl and Lockdown's complicated history comes to a head as the bounty hunter collects the most dangerous fugitives in the galaxy.

episodes.title: Predacons Rising
episodes.synopsis: Blackarachnia's experiments create the Predacons, a new faction of beast-mode Transformers that threatens both Autobots and Decepticons.

episodes.title: Human Error, Part I
episodes.synopsis: Soundwave traps the Autobots in a virtual reality where they believe they are ordinary humans living normal lives in Detroit.

episodes.title: Human Error, Part II
episodes.synopsis: Sari and the Substitute Autobots — Wreck-Gar, the Dinobots, and Soundwave's own creation — fight to free the team from the virtual prison.

episodes.title: Decepticon Air
episodes.synopsis: Optimus Prime and his crew must infiltrate a Decepticon warship to rescue captured Autobots as the war enters its final phase.

episodes.title: This Is Why I Hate Machines
episodes.synopsis: Captain Fanzone is accidentally transported to Cybertron, where the tech-phobic cop must navigate an entire planet of machines.

episodes.title: Endgame, Part I
episodes.synopsis: Megatron launches his final assault using Omega Supreme clones, and Prowl discovers a way to reassemble the AllSpark at great personal cost.

episodes.title: Endgame, Part II
episodes.synopsis: In the series finale, Prowl sacrifices his spark to reassemble the AllSpark, Megatron is finally captured, and Optimus Prime's team returns to Cybertron as celebrated heroes.

media.title: Transformers Animated All Videos - Dailymotion Channel

facts: Transformers: Animated was produced by Cartoon Network with character designs inspired by shows like Teen Titans and Ben 10, giving it a bold, angular art style unlike any previous Transformers series.
Animation was handled by multiple Japanese studios including Mook, Studio 4C, and MOOK DLE, while story and voice direction remained in the US.
A planned Season 4 was cancelled when Hasbro shifted focus to the Transformers: Prime series; extensive story outlines for the unproduced season have since been shared by the show's creators.
The three-part premiere debuted at #1 among boys ages 6-11 in both cable and network television, making it one of Cartoon Network's strongest launches.

The series featured several Generation 1 voice actors in new roles, most notably Corey Burton who voiced both Megatron and Ratchet — the first time a single actor voiced both factions' most prominent characters.
Bulkhead, originally created for this series, proved so popular that the character was carried forward into subsequent Transformers continuities including Transformers: Prime.
